title: Arrays, Dynamic Sequences, and Locality · Invariant Recall
summary: Design an event buffer with predictable indexing, insertion, and memory behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an array-backed sequence with operation traces after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain indexing and cache-local traversal from contiguous logical storage.
Trace capacity growth and amortized append behavior through resize events.
Compare indexed access, search, middle insertion, deletion, slicing, and copying costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
